description: Brain-repo skill registry — single source of truth per AGENT_PRODUCT_CYCLE.md §12 Skill Registry & Discovery. A skill belongs here only if it is used (or expected to be used) by 2+ products; product-specific skills live in their product repo. Required entry fields: skill_id, version, owner, description, location, inputs, outputs, compatible_agent_layers, tags, run_when, prerequisite. /skills/registry.json is currently a co-located duplicate carried from initial scaffolding; this file is canonical.

skills.description: Structured interview that generates the four brain repo context files: [YOUR-NAME].md, [COMPANY].md, STACK.md, CONSTRAINTS.md. Run at brain repo setup and when principal, company, stack, or constraints change significantly.
skills.run_when: Brain repo setup, or when principal/company/stack/constraints change significantly.

skills.description: Focused interview that generates a CLAUDE.md for a specific product repo. Covers product purpose, architecture, formatting rules, product-specific constraints, and protected files. Assumes brain repo context files already exist.
skills.run_when: New product repo setup, major architectural change, new product-specific compliance requirements.
skills.prerequisite: context-interview-brain must have been run first. Brain repo context files must exist.
